tagline: Cloud / DevOps Engineer (Entry-Level) · AWS · GCP · Firebase · Terraform · GitHub Actions · JLPT N2 · Ho Chi Minh City
about_description: Hello and welcome! I'm Henry, a multilingual and motivated developer based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, fluent in English, Japanese, and Vietnamese. I am deeply passionate about technology, continuous learning, and working in diverse, cross-cultural environments. Currently, I am focusing on Cloud and DevOps technologies, including AWS, GCP, and Vercel, with hands-on experience building and deploying modern web applications. I am actively seeking internship, trainee, or entry-level opportunities in the Cloud/DevOps field, where I can contribute to innovative IT projects and grow into a future-ready engineer who creates meaningful impact through technology
hero_subtitle: Building secure, serverless infrastructure on AWS — based in Ho Chi Minh City, open to roles globally.

project_label_securevault_iac: Vite · React · Node.js · AWS · Terraform · Vercel
securevault_iac_desc: Production-grade full-stack cloud storage platform demonstrating modern DevOps practices. Frontend: Vite + React with multi-user authentication (Cognito signup/login, email verification, MFA-ready, password reset). Backend: Node.js Lambda functions with JWT validation, per-user data isolation, S3 presigned URLs. Infrastructure: Terraform-provisioned AWS (Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, API Gateway, Cognito, CloudFront, IAM, KMS). Deployment: Vercel (frontend) + AWS (backend + IaC). Features: modular Terraform modules, dev/staging/prod environments, least-privilege IAM, security headers, 1-year asset caching.
portfofia_desc: A multilingual personal portfolio platform with realtime chat, OAuth sign-in across three providers (Google, GitHub, Facebook), four-language i18n, Firestore-backed guestbook, and an embedded HTML5 Canvas game. Full-stack JavaScript with Firebase infrastructure — authentication, real-time database, Firestore, and hosting.
lifehub_title: LifeHub AI Cloud — Personal Productivity Workspace
lifehub_desc: A secure personal productivity and document management web app for organizing files, private notes, saved links, profile settings, and a safe activity history in one cloud workspace. React + Vite frontend on Firebase Hosting, Firebase Authentication, Cloud Firestore for user-isolated data, Cloud Storage for uploads, and Terraform-managed Google Cloud infrastructure. Premium SaaS-style responsive dashboard with per-user Firestore and Storage security rules.

motivation_text: After attending your company’s information session and company tour, I was deeply impressed by your innovative use of cutting-edge technology. I am particularly drawn to your vision for addressing societal challenges such as the declining birthrate and aging population. I aspire to contribute with my development skills and grow together with your company.
appeal_text: I am proactive, possess strong communication skills, and have a strong sense of responsibility. I can act calmly and swiftly even in complex situations, and have built smooth relationships within diverse teams. My strong sense of responsibility is rooted in Japanese culture, and I believe these qualities will allow me to make meaningful contributions to your company.
